questions.helpText: Indicate if either of you has been married previously

sections.title: Relationship Origin
sections.description: How your relationship started and developed.

questions.label: How did you meet your spouse?
questions.helpText: Select how you first met your spouse

sections.title: Relationship Strength
sections.description: Your current communication and relationship dynamics.

questions.label: How often do you communicate?

questions.helpText: Select your primary method(s) of communication

sections.title: Family & Social Proof
sections.description: Your connection with each other's family and social circle.

questions.label: Have you met your spouse's family?
questions.helpText: Indicate whether you have met your spouse's family members

questions.label: Was your marriage religious, civil, or both?
questions.helpText: Select the type of marriage ceremony you had

sections.title: Petitioner & Settlement Plans
sections.description: Key details about your sponsor and your relocation plan.

questions.label: What is the petitioner's immigration status?
questions.helpText: Specify the immigration status of the person filing the petition

questions.label: What is the petitioner's income level?
questions.helpText: Select the appropriate income bracket relative to the poverty guidelines

sections.title: Background & Compliance
sections.description: Mandatory background and immigration compliance checks.

questions.label: Have you ever been denied a US visa?
questions.helpText: Indicate if you have previously had a US visa application denied

questions.label: Have you ever overstayed a visa in any country?
questions.helpText: Indicate if you have ever remained in a country beyond your authorized visa period

questions.label: Have you ever been arrested or charged with a crime?
questions.helpText: Honestly indicate any criminal history or arrests
